mentions.note: Parent company down 60% from 13-month peak; gated fund redemptions, suspicious asset sales, conflict-of-interest concerns; canary in private credit coal mine.
Private credit/BDC operator gating redemptions; suspicious asset sales at par to insiders; market doubts loan valuations given tech exposure; down 60% from highs.

Highest-risk private credit firm; Cramer won't buy stock, won't short portfolio; cautions firm must prove loan quality by funding redemptions via sales; if can't raise cash, shorting becomes justified.
